title: October 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 23''' is the 296th day of the year (297th in leap years), with 69 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [["Weird Al" Yankovic]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Allison Shearmur]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[David Sobolov]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Grant Imahara]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Emilia Clarke]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Ritesh Rajan]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back 3|''Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back'' 3]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 43]]'' published.
*2003 – ''[[Rebel Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[William Hootkins]] dies.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 9]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Star Wars Insider 97|''Star Wars Insider'' 97]] hits [[Wikipedia:United States|US]] newsstands.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Mouse Hunt]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 2: New Galactic Order]]'' webcomic concludes.
*2009 – ''[[Timeline 5: The Battle of Bothawui]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Four|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season Four]] released. 
*2012 – [[Star Wars Insider 137|''Star Wars Insider'' 137]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 8|''Legacy'' (2013) 8]] published.
*[[2017]] – "[[In the Name of the Rebellion]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Scum and Villainy: Case Files on the Galaxy's Most Notorious]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Allegiance 3|''Allegiance'' 3]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 4|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 73|''Star Wars'' (2015) 73]] published.
<noinclude>
